name: Black Bean Dip with Garlic
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp coarsely chopped fresh cilantro, plus additional sprigs for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine all ingredients except the cilantro sprigs.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of water and process until smooth.
3. Transfer the dip to a serving bowl.
4. Garnish with cilantro sprigs.
5. Serve with your favorite fat-free tortilla chips.
